column1: # /Worksheet Global Default Other Clock — toggle the status-line clock
# slot through Standard / International / None / Filename.
# We can't assert on a live clock value (it changes between runs), so
# instead we use a saved filename as a stable presence/absence signal.
# Default mode is Filename, so the filename should be in the status
# line right after the save. Toggling to Standard, International, or
# None must remove it; toggling back to Filename restores it.
# The format functions themselves are covered by clock.rs unit tests.
# Save a workbook so active_path is set and the filename has something
# /WGDOCS — switch to Standard (12-hour clock). The filename slot is
# replaced by a clock string, so the filename disappears from screen.
# /WGDOCI — International (24-hour). Still a clock; still no filename.
